biological_replicate: SP3-FAIMS chemoproteomic analysis in biological duplicate
technical_replicate: in biological replicates the biotinylation efficiency was substantially reduced
experimental_design: analysis of proteomes derived from multiple cell lines
factor_value: seven cell lines derived from a diverse range of tissue types
number_of_fractions: fractionated by ultracentrifugation into membrane and soluble fractions
number_of_samples: our analysis of 18 samples from seven cell lines
